title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SigTuple - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
SigTuple invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SigTuple:
SigTuple is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SigTuple!
